name: rotated_t_junction_dual_inlet_single_outlet
description: Non-axis-aligned T-junction closed shell with four STL solids (inlet_1, inlet_2, outlet_1, walls). Geometry is a single connected manifold extruded to 80 mm depth from a 340x200 mm T-profile, then rotated in 3D to stress multi-patch centroid voting and patch-normal-aware inlet BC authoring on three differently oriented terminal faces.

expected_outcome.qualitative_description: Two opposing angled inflows merge inside the rotated T-junction and are redirected through the stem outlet. Expect a high-shear collision zone near the junction center, pressure recovery toward the outlet branch, and sensitivity to multi-patch face classification where inlet edges share adjacent wall seams.
